shots.title: Add HazardSeverity type and penalty mapping
shots.notes: Added HazardSeverity type ('minor'|'moderate'|'major'|'critical') to types.ts, optional severity field on HazardHit, and HAZARD_SEVERITY_PENALTIES constant to constants.ts. 2 files, 13 lines. Clean and minimal.

shots.title: Update scoring to include hazard penalties

hazards.description: Adding required hazard_penalties field to HoleStats caused test churn across 22 files in all 4 packages — every inline HoleStats construction needed updating

shots.notes: Updated builder.ts computeStatsFromShots to sum hazard penalties, normalizeStats (all 3 return paths), buildScorecard and buildAgentBreakdowns score formulas. Updated init.ts template, MCP registry type, and 18 test files with inline HoleStats fixtures across all packages.

shots.title: Update formatter and validation
shots.notes: Added conditional Hazard Penalties row in formatter review table, INVALID_HAZARD_SEVERITY validation rule checking severity enum, and re-exported HazardSeverity type and HAZARD_SEVERITY_PENALTIES constant from index.ts. 3 files, 20 lines. All in one pass.

shots.title: Tests for hazard severity scoring
shots.notes: Added 11 new tests: 6 in builder.test.ts (severity computation, rounding, defaults, multiple hazards, score inclusion), 3 in validation.test.ts (valid/invalid/omitted severity), 2 in formatter.test.ts (row shown/hidden). All passed first run.

conditions.description: Resumed from a crashed/context-lost session — previous agent had done S25-1 but plan was rejected

nutrition.description: Clean build + typecheck + all 1071 tests pass (780→791 core + 36 store + 190 CLI + 65 MCP) after final commit
4 separate commits for 4 tickets — proper commit discipline. Each commit pushed immediately.
Zero existing test regressions. 11 new tests added. Test fixture churn across 22 files handled cleanly with parallel edits.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth execution despite the cross-package type change blast radius. The biggest effort was S25-2's test fixture updates — adding hazard_penalties to every inline HoleStats across all 4 packages (22 files). The actual feature logic was small and clean.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: When adding a required field to HoleStats, expect ~20 inline test fixtures to need updating across all packages (core, cli, store-sqlite, mcp-tools). The MCP registry.ts has its own inline type definitions that also need syncing. Use grep for 'hazards_hit' to find all locations.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The MCP registry.ts has a duplicate HoleStats interface definition — it's a standalone inline type, not imported from core. This needs syncing manually when core types change.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Hazard severity is the first feature that uses the new field — scorecards can now express that a 'critical' hazard (e.g., production incident) costs 2 penalty strokes while a 'minor' one (e.g., flaky test) costs 0. This will make scoring more nuanced.

bunker_locations: Adding a required field to HoleStats causes test churn across all 4 packages — ~20 inline fixtures need updating
MCP registry.ts has standalone inline type definitions that must be manually synced with core types
yardage_book_updates: packages/core/src/types.ts: Added HazardSeverity type, optional severity on HazardHit, hazard_penalties on HoleStats
packages/core/src/builder.ts: Updated scoring to compute and include hazard_penalties
packages/core/src/formatter.ts: Conditional Hazard Penalties row in review table
packages/mcp-tools/src/registry.ts: Synced HoleStats inline type definition
course_management_notes: 4 shots: 2 in_the_hole + 2 green — 1 moderate hazard (test fixture churn), zero penalties, par
30 files changed across 5 commits, 443 lines added, 27 removed
Core test count: 780 → 791 (+11 new hazard severity tests)
First scorecard to use the new hazard_penalties and severity fields
